name: Fruit Tarts
recipeInstructions:
- Combine the shortening and cheese spread in a medium bowl. Cut in the flour until well blended.
- Shape into a roll, 1 1/4 inches in diameter and 12 inches long. Wrap completely in waxed paper or plastic wrap.
- Refrigerate for at least 1 hour or longer.
- Preheat oven to 375 degrees F (190 degrees C).
- Remove dough from the refrigerator and unwrap. Slice into 1/8-inch thick pieces.
- Place one slice of dough in the bottom of each muffin cup or tart pan. Overlap five slices around the outside.
- Gently press together. Pierce bottoms and sides with a fork.
- Bake for 18 to 20 minutes until lightly browned, then cool on a rack.
- Cut orange sections into 3 pieces; set aside.
- Drain pineapple, reserving syrup.
- Combine pineapple syrup, orange juice, and lemon juice in a saucepan. Stir in the rest of the ingredients (except cheddar cheese) until thickened and bubbly.
- Add orange and pineapple pieces. Refrigerate for at least 1 hour.
- Spoon chilled filling into tart shells and sprinkle with about 1 tablespoon cheddar cheese each.
- Refrigerate until serving time.
